detectors.description:
IROH.sendETHToFee(uint256) (IROH.sol#561-567) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _feeAddrWallet1.transfer(amount.div(2)) (IROH.sol#563)
	- _feeAddrWallet2.transfer(amount.div(2)) (IROH.sol#565)
detectors.markdown:
[IROH.sendETHToFee(uint256)](IROH.sol#L561-L567) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [_feeAddrWallet1.transfer(amount.div(2))](IROH.sol#L563)
	- [_feeAddrWallet2.transfer(amount.div(2))](IROH.sol#L565)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in IROH._transfer(address,address,uint256) (IROH.sol#459-529):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (IROH.sol#511)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (IROH.sol#543-555)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (IROH.sol#517)
		- _feeAddrWallet1.transfer(amount.div(2)) (IROH.sol#563)
		- _feeAddrWallet2.transfer(amount.div(2)) (IROH.sol#565)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (IROH.sol#527)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (IROH.sol#721)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (IROH.sol#685)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rAmount) (IROH.sol#691)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (IROH.sol#699)
	IROH._rOwned (IROH.sol#229) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- IROH._takeTeam(uint256) (IROH.sol#715-723)
	- IROH._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (IROH.sol#679-711)
	- IROH.balanceOf(address) (IROH.sol#377-381)
	- IROH.constructor(address,address) (IROH.sol#307-341)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (IROH.sol#527)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (IROH.sol#729)
	IROH._rTotal (IROH.sol#247) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- IROH._getCurrentSupply() (IROH.sol#823-833)
	- IROH._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (IROH.sol#727-733)
	- IROH.constructor(address,address) (IROH.sol#307-341)
	- IROH.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (IROH.sol#433-441)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in IROH.openTrading() (IROH.sol#571-607):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (IROH.sol#583)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (IROH.sol#593)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (IROH.sol#593)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (IROH.sol#601)
	IROH.tradingOpen (IROH.sol#279) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- IROH.openTrading() (IROH.sol#571-607)
